text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has rebuilt her winning equation
from the ground up in preparation for the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During that process, she has gained a newfound
intensity. Even Narita Taishin and Winning Ticket
can't help but notice the difference.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The BNW showdown is about to take place in the
final Classic race, and sparks are sure to fly!
